hooks.command:
echo '
--- SESSION ENDING ---
Before stopping, write a handoff note if work is in progress:
  File: docs/superpowers/HANDOFF.md
  Include: goal, completed work, remaining work, modified files, blockers.
This enables clean context resets for the next session.
---'
echo 'Reminder: run /verify after edits. Both apps must pass typecheck + tests + build.'
echo 'Check output for errors before proceeding.'
